title: NotebookLM Changed Completely: Here's What Matters (in 2026)
summary: Google's NotebookLM platform received major updates and now includes a redesigned three-column layout and expanded Studio panel with nine output formats. Key Tier 1 tools include Reports, Slide Decks, and Infographics, while Tier 2 tools cover Data Tables, Video Overviews, Quiz, Flashcards, and Audio Overviews. The platform processes source documents and converts them into finished reports, presentations, and multimedia outputs.
